name: Honey Gelato
recipeInstructions:
1. This is a trendy type of ice cream that is also good for you, and best of all, wonderfully low in calories. A ½ cup serving has 70 calories, so you can make up a batch and indulge without guilt.
2. Mix gelatin and dry milk in a saucepan. Stir in skim milk, cook over low heat, stirring constantly until gelatin dissolves. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in honey and juices. Pour into a freezer-safe dish, 9-inch cake pan or ice cube tray and freeze for 1 hour.
4. Pour the mixture into a chilled bowl and add the egg whites. Beat at high speed with an electric mixer until the mixture is fluffy. Return to the freezer-safe container, cover, and freeze until firm.
Yield: 42 oz
Source: Cheaper and Better Alternatives to store-bought goods by Nancy Birnes (Found by Fran McGee)
